roa.docketEntryComment: APP/ORD RELEASED EXHIBITS TO T.LAVORINI FOR DISPOSAL ON 2/2/2023
SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORDER RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
NTC OF APPEAL,REQ FOR COURT-APP ATTY,NTC REGARDING RECORD ON APPEAL FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/INTC/CTORD:THAT THE SENTENCES IN COUNTS ONE & TWO ARE THESAME & CONCURRENT:/654:2/AJW/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 30 D/CTS:1/SWAPD:01-04-17/PF390 12/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/1463ALC/EMAT/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COLLECT/FOP1:THREE (3)-MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:JURY DELIBERATIONS/DAWT/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICT AS FOLLOWS:/X: GUILTY VERDICT ON COUNT 001 23152(A) PC A MISDEMEANOR & COUNT 002 23152(B) PC AMISDEMEANOR,  THE VC 23578 ALLEGATION TO COUNT 001 IS FOUND TO BE TRUE,  THE VC 23578 ALLEGATION TO COUNT 002 IS FOUND TO BE TRUE,/X:COUNT 003 2818VC A INFRACTION WAS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PC 1385 - INTEREST OF JUSTICE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOPC/

/CAL:TRIAL/LD:12-19-16/X:DA MOTION TO CONTINUE IS FILED,/TEXT:TRANS TO CIVIC CENTER COURT HOUSE/TRANS CC:FORTHWITH, DEPT, 608, JUDGE PHILIP SARKISIAN AT 9AM ON 12-19-16/X:BOTH SIDES DECLARED READY FOR TRIAL,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR THRU COUNSEL IN CIVC CENTER COURT HOUSE AT 9AM/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X:A CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT APPEARED UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF SEIYA JOHNSON,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/GTWM/987,2/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO THE RECORD/NP/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED;REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE SARKISIAN/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATIONS
/CAL:JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE SARKISIAN/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE DEFENSE CASE/CONTD:CLOSING ARGUMENTS & DELIBERATION/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE SARKISIAN/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE PROSECUTION CASE//CONT/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE SARKISIAN/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE VOIR DIRE- JURY SELECTION/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TRIAL/NP/DEF:IS ON A STANDBY/LD:12-19-16/CONT/DEF:REMAINS ON A STANDBY/
